title: RNAIonScan: Ion Binding Mode Classifier for RNA
author: Frazão de Souza Degenhardt, Maximilia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A Python-based tool for analyzing ion behavior in RNA structures across structural ensembles. The package identifies ion coordination modes, classifies ions as rigid or flexible, and distinguishes between direct coordination and hydration-mediated interactions.
steps_raw: A Python-based tool for analyzing ion behavior in RNA structures across structural ensembles. The package identifies ion coordination modes, classifies ions as rigid or flexible, and distinguishes between direct coordination and hydration-mediated interactions.
